cover.subtitle:
덩이쇠로 부를 쌓고도
연맹에서 멈춘 나라.
cover.imagePrompt: Gaya federation illustration, 5th century. ONE Gaya ironworker figure in earth-toned robe and leather apron, holding a flat iron ingot (deongi-soe) up to forge fire, sparks rising. Background: Daeseong-dong burial mound silhouette and Nakdong river bend. Composition: artisan focus, glowing forge. Color: iron-gray + clay-brown + amber forge light. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 금관가야(전기·김해·법흥왕 532)와 대가야(후기·고령·진흥왕 562)를 헷갈리게 묻는다. '김해=금관, 고령=대가야' 지명 매칭과 멸망 시킨 신라 왕을 한 묶음으로 외울 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized flat iron ingot (deongi-soe) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small Gaya gold crown silhouette with three prongs. Cream #F2EDE3 base + iron-gray #6B6E72 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
